overview: Fort Wayne Primary Care offers primary care medicine integrated with bioidentical hormone replacement therapy, IV infusion therapy, hyperbaric oxygen therapy, and on-site laboratory services (Sunrise Labs).
highlights: On-site laboratory for urine, blood, and other testing
Bioidentical hormone pellets and creams for men and women
IV infusion and hyperbaric oxygen therapy
targetAudience: Patients in the Fort Wayne area seeking primary care integrated with hormone balancing and wellness services.
